installPrompt.title: Install Jamm
installPrompt.subtitle: Open it faster and use it like a standalone app.
installPrompt.heroTitle: Launching from the home screen is smoother
installPrompt.heroDescription: Add Jamm to your home screen to open it faster and without the browser chrome.

android.step1Description: Your browser will open the install prompt.
android.step2Description: After confirming, Jamm will appear on your home screen like a separate app.
android.hint: On Android browsers this uses the native install prompt.

ios.step1Description: Tap the Share button in Safari or your iOS browser.
ios.step2Description: Find Add to Home Screen in the actions list.
ios.step3Description: Jamm will then appear on your home screen like a separate app.
ios.hint: On iPhone and iPad the install is not automatic and must be done through the Share menu.

courses.searchDescription: Use search to find the course you need. Both courses and arena items are easy to reach from here.
courses.tabsDescription: Switch between your course list and the arena section from these tabs.
courses.createDescription: Use this button to start your own course.
courses.listDescription: Courses you joined or manage appear here. Selecting one opens it on the right.
courses.contentDescription: Lessons, videos, assignments and course controls open here for the selected course.

chats.searchDescription: Search for users or groups from here. Video meets also live inside this module.
chats.tabsDescription: These tabs switch between private chats, groups and video calls.
chats.privateTabDescription: Your direct conversations and saved messages stay in this tab.
chats.groupsTabDescription: Group chats and their controls are managed from this tab.
chats.videoTabDescription: Created meets and video rooms are listed in this tab.
chats.listDescription: All available conversations appear here. Tap one to open it on the right.
chats.contentDescription: Messages, replies and the composer for the selected chat open in this area.

profile.entryDescription: Press the profile avatar button here. The next step will open the profile page automatically.
profile.overviewDescription: Your avatar, stats and main profile sections are grouped here.
profile.editTriggerDescription: At the end of the tour, use this button to open the profile editor.
profile.editDialogDescription: Update your nickname, username, avatar and bio in this dialog.
profile.groupsTabDescription: Open your personal posts from this tab.
profile.groupsPaneDescription: Create, edit and browse your posts in this area.
profile.coursesTabDescription: Your courses and lessons are available from here.
profile.coursesPaneDescription: Browse your courses here and jump into the course page.
profile.articlesTabDescription: Your articles and article management live in this tab.
profile.articlesPaneDescription: Create, read and edit your articles in this view.
profile.appearanceTabDescription: Use this tab to control how the interface looks.
profile.languageTabDescription: Change the app language from this section.
profile.appearancePaneDescription: Light and dark appearance settings are managed here.
profile.premiumTabDescription: Premium status, promo codes and profile decorations are here.
profile.supportTabDescription: Help and support contacts are available here.
profile.favoritesTabDescription: Your liked lessons, posts and articles are collected here.
profile.premiumPaneDescription: Manage plans, promo codes and profile decorations from this panel.

courseSidebar.emptyDescription: Press + to create a new course
courseSidebar.searchEmptyDescription: Try changing the search or create a new course.
courseSidebar.arenaEmptyDescription: Change the search and check the arena section again.
courseSidebar.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete <bold>{{name}}</bold>? This action cannot be undone and all related videos, files, and data will be removed.

chatsSidebar.connectError: Could not connect to the server
chatsSidebar.emptyDescription: Start with search or create a new conversation.

meetDialog.title: Create meet
meetDialog.subtitle: Share the link or start right away.
meetDialog.fallbackError: Could not prepare the meet. Please try again.
meetDialog.singleActive: You can keep one active meet at a time.

groupDialog.title: Create group
groupDialog.subtitle: Open a new group and add participants.
groupDialog.groupDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the purpose of the group...
groupDialog.membersHint: Add at least 1 person. Member selection opens in a separate panel.

articles.author: Author
articles.emptyDescription: Try changing the search or create a new article.
articles.deleteDescription: Do you really want to delete this article?
articles.wordLimitDescription: The article must be at most {{count}} words.
articles.editorSubtitle: Medium-style markdown editor with cover, inline image, preview, and publish.

editor.coverUploadDescription: Pick the hero cover here just like on frontend.

errors.formatNotSupported: Your browser does not support this video format (for example, .mov may not play directly in Chrome).
errors.playback: An error occurred while starting the video.
errors.playbackToken: Could not get permission to load the video.
errors.hlsUnsupported: Your browser does not support HLS playback.
errors.hlsPlayback: An error occurred while playing the HLS video.

empty.title: Select a course
empty.description: Choose a course from the list on the left or create a new one.

extras.title: Lesson extras
extras.description: Open materials, tests, and homework here.

attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.adminHint: Manage student attendance for this lesson
attendance.studentHint: Watching at least 70% of the lesson marks attendance
attendance.noRecord: No attendance has been recorded for you yet

homework.title: Homework
homework.adminHint: Create the task and review student submissions
homework.studentHint: Submit your response in the required format
homework.dialogSubtitle: Set the task type, deadline, and maximum score.
homework.alreadySubmitted: This task has already been submitted. You can submit again only if the teacher requests revision.
homework.disabled: Homework is not enabled for this lesson yet
homework.disabledStudent: No homework was assigned for this lesson
homework.emptySubmissions: No one has submitted anything yet

errors.fileOrLinkRequired: Provide a file or a link
errors.limitReached: This plan allows up to {{count}} homework task(s) per lesson
errors.textTooLong: Homework text must not exceed {{count}} characters

materials.title: Lesson materials
materials.adminHint: Attach PDF materials to this lesson
materials.studentHint: Open the lesson PDFs attached here

grading.title: Grading
grading.adminHint: See lesson grading and the overall course status of students
grading.studentHint: See your lesson and course performance

adminPane.title: Lesson management
adminPane.subtitle: All lessons, students, and statistics in one place

lessonTests.title: Lesson tests
lessonTests.adminHint: Attach an Arena test or sentence-builder link and define the unlock rule
lessonTests.limitReached: Only one test can be linked to a lesson
lessonTests.saveError: Failed to save the lesson test
lessonTests.deleteError: Failed to delete the lesson test
lessonTests.submitError: Failed to save the test result
lessonTests.emptyAdmin: No test is attached to this lesson
lessonTests.emptyStudent: There is no test for this lesson
lessonTests.dialogSubtitle: Paste an Arena test URL, test share-link URL, or sentence-builder URL.
lessonTests.deleteConfirmDescription: Do you want to remove this lesson-test link?
lessonTests.builderComposeHint: Build the sentence by tapping the tokens
lessonTests.builderNoBreakdown: Detailed answers are hidden for this test.
lessonTests.lockedDescription: You need to pass the required test from the previous lesson before opening the next lesson.

locked.noLessonsAdmin: Press the + button on the right to add a lesson.
locked.draftDescription: This lesson has not been published yet.
locked.draftAdminDescription: This lesson is still a draft. Attach media and publish it, or continue editing.
locked.missingMediaDescription: A video or file is not ready for this lesson yet.
locked.missingMediaAdminDescription: The lesson exists, but no video or file has been attached yet.
locked.pendingDescription: Your request is being reviewed by the admin. Please wait.
locked.enrollDescription: You need to enroll first to watch the lessons. You can view them after the admin approves your request.

deleteLesson.title: Delete lesson
deleteLesson.description: Are you sure you want to delete this lesson? Any attached video will also be removed.

createCourse.title: Create new course
createCourse.imagePrompt: Enter an image URL for the course
createCourse.name: Course name *

addLesson.title: Add new lesson
addLesson.createSubtitle: Create the lesson as a draft first. You can attach the video or file later.
addLesson.editSubtitle: Update the lesson details and publish it when ready.
addLesson.draftNotice: This lesson is currently a draft. Publish it to make it visible to students.
addLesson.premiumNotice: Premium is required for file uploads. On the free plan you can only add video through a YouTube URL.
addLesson.fileDropTitle: Upload a file or drop it here
addLesson.videoCountLimitHint: You can upload up to {{count}} video(s) to one lesson.
addLesson.videoCountLimitError: This plan allows up to {{count}} video(s) per lesson
addLesson.totalUploadLimitError: Total uploaded videos for one lesson must not exceed 200MB
addLesson.processingMeta: The file reached the server and is now being split into HLS segments.
addLesson.optionalMediaHint: Media is optional while saving a draft.

meetDialog.title: Create Group Video Call
meetDialog.subtitle: Enter a title, choose privacy, and create a meet quickly.
meetDialog.heroDescription: A link appears after creation. If public, people join instantly; if private, they join after approval.
meetDialog.detailsDescription: Enter the room name and a short note.
meetDialog.name: Room name
meetDialog.privacyPrivateHint: Only people you approve can enter
meetDialog.privacyPublicHint: Anyone with the link can join immediately
meetDialog.publicDescription: Anyone with the link joins immediately.
meetDialog.privateDescription: People wait first, then you approve them.
meetDialog.footerNote: After creation you will see the meet in the sidebar.

groupCall.waitingDescription: Wait until the call host approves your request
groupCall.rejectedDescription: The call host rejected your request
groupCall.screenShareUnavailable: Screen sharing is not supported in iPhone browsers yet

mnemonics.title: Mnemonics
mnemonics.description: Only the best result is saved and shown in the ranking.
mnemonics.setupHintDigits: The digit count can be from 1 to {{count}}. Only the best result is saved.
mnemonics.setupHintWords: The word count can be from 1 to {{count}}. The prepared noun pool contains {{total}} words. Only the best result is saved.

results.empty: No results found for this filter.
results.question: Question

createBattle.title: New battle room
createBattle.name: Battle name
createBattle.emptyTests: No tests found yet. If you created one, the list may still be refreshing.
createBattle.publicInfo: This room is open to everyone and appears in the Active Battles list.
createBattle.unlistedInfo: This room does not appear in the list. Only people with the room ID can join.

feed.title: Posts
feed.fullComposePlaceholder: Write your thoughts... markdown is supported: **bold**, _italic_, #tag
feed.emptyFollowing: You will see posts from users you follow

feed.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete it?
feed.imagePremiumDescription: Adding images to the feed is available only for premium users.
feed.imageLimitDescription: You can add at most 3 images to one post.
feed.selectionLimitDescription: Only the first 3 images were selected.
feed.previewErrorDescription: Could not prepare a preview for {{name}}.
feed.uploadErrorDescription: An error occurred while uploading images.

comments.title: Comments
comments.empty: No comments yet. Be the first to write one!

premium.title: Jamm Premium
premium.description: Manage premium status, promo code and plans.

support.title: Support
support.description: Quick contact points for issues and questions.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.description: A separate section for saved content.

learn.title: Learn the app
learn.description: Restart the guided walkthrough for profile, courses, and chats.

learn.title: Learn the app
learn.description: This starts the full guided tour again from the profile section and continues through courses and chats.

storage.title: Device storage
storage.description: Manage the images and videos that Jamm has stored on this device.
storage.summaryDescription: Remove items you no longer need to free up space.
storage.feedImagesDescription: Images kept from your feed browsing.
storage.courseVideosDescription: Lesson videos saved offline or kept in cache.
storage.deleteFeedDescription: This feed image will be removed from your device storage.
storage.deleteVideoDescription: This course video will be removed from your device storage.
storage.clearFeedDescription: All cached feed images will be removed from this device.
storage.clearVideosDescription: All cached course videos will be removed from this device.
storage.clearAllDescription: Feed images and course videos will be removed from this device.

security.statusDescription: Jamm can lock itself when you switch tabs or move to another app.
security.appLockMeta: Your PIN is stored and verified only on the server.
security.groupInvitesDescription: When enabled, other users can add you to groups.
security.passcodeDescription: Set or change a 4-digit passcode like Telegram.
security.autoLockDescription: When the app goes to the background, it will ask for your PIN on return.
security.currentPinDescription: Confirm your current app passcode to continue.
security.turnOffDescription: Your current passcode is required to remove the lock.
security.unlockDescription: Enter your 4-digit app passcode to continue.
security.unlockRequiredToast: Enter your app passcode first to continue.
security.footer: Your PIN is verified only on the server.
security.forgotHelp: Forgot your PIN? You can log out and sign in again, and the app will not ask for the passcode.
security.pinMismatch: The confirmation code did not match
security.groupInvitesSaveError: Failed to save the group invite setting
security.saveError: Failed to save the app passcode

appearance.groupDescription: For now, only the main theme switch is available.
appearance.themeDescription: The Jamm interface works in dark or light mode.

language.groupDescription: Selected values are stored in local storage.

premium.statusDescription: Current subscription and activation via promo code.
premium.aboutDescription: See what features unlock with a Premium subscription.
premium.promoDescription: Enter a code to activate Premium quickly.
premium.decorationDescription: Premium subscribers can add an animated decoration after their nickname.
premium.decorationNoneMeta: Only the nickname will be shown.
premium.decorationLockedDescription: Animated nickname decorations are available only for premium subscribers.
premium.decorationImageReplace: Select or replace the custom decoration
premium.decorationImageError: Failed to upload the custom decoration image

support.premiumDescription: For questions about subscriptions, promo codes, or limits.
support.jammDescription: For general technical issues or account problems.

favorites.lessonsDescription: Your favorite lessons are collected here.
favorites.postsDescription: A list of posts you liked.

premiumModal.title: Jamm Premium
premiumModal.subtitle: All limits in one place. Premium unlocks higher caps and a smoother teaching workflow.
premiumModal.premiumPlanDescription: More content, more students, and broader lesson control.

courses.title: Courses and lessons
courses.description: Lesson media, tests, and homework limits.

premiumModal.footerNote: Some limits are total size caps, while others are counted per lesson or per post.

testsList.openFailedDescription: This test could not be opened.
testsList.deleteDescription: The test and its results will be removed.
testsList.limitDescription: You can create at most {{count}} tests.

shareLinks.builderCopiedDescription: Sentence builder link copied to clipboard.
shareLinks.deleteDescription: This short link will be revoked.
shareLinks.groupRequiredDescription: Enter a group name for a saved link.

resultsScreen.title: Test results
resultsScreen.subtitle: Users who took "{{title}}" and the breakdown for each question.
resultsScreen.groupHint: Results are loaded page by page by group.
resultsScreen.emptyFiltered: No attempts found for the group "{{group}}".
resultsScreen.empty: No saved attempts for this test yet.

dashboard.welcomeDescription: Choose a section from the menu on the left: solve tests, memorize vocabulary, or compete with friends.
